description: abstract base class pyramid instead of flat mixin
input:
class AbstractContentProcessor
  def process(content)
    raise NotImplementedError
  end
end

class AbstractHtmlProcessor < AbstractContentProcessor
  def sanitize(html)
    raise NotImplementedError
  end
end

class BodySanitizer < AbstractHtmlProcessor
  def process(content)
    sanitize(content.body)
  end

  def sanitize(html)
    ActionController::Base.helpers.sanitize(html)
  end
end
